allowed_tools.description: Optional list of tool ids the skill is meant to reach for.

description.description: One-line description shown in the list view + system-prompt skill index.

files.description: Optional companion files at creation time.

content.description: File body. Plain text or markdown — companion files are not interpreted by the runner.

content_type.description: MIME type hint. Read-only at runtime; aids the registry UI's file viewer.

path.description: Relative path inside the skill folder. Becomes `bundle/skills/<alias>/<path>` at freeze.

name.description: Slug-shaped name unique per team. `@posthog/<slug>` is reserved for canonical templates.
